response.justification: The candidate is a highly skilled and versatile senior developer, but is a very poor fit for this specific role. He critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of recent, hands-on C++ experience on the Windows platform. His resume shows less than one year of professional C++ work which occurred nearly a decade ago. Furthermore, he does not have the required domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income, nor the specified SQL Server/Oracle experience.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior/staff engineer with a modern development mindset (TDD, CI/CD).
Versatile technologist with experience across web, mobile, and desktop using various languages.
Strong communication and community engagement skills, demonstrated through workshops and talks.
concerns: Almost no professional C++ experience; the primary requirement of 5-10 years is not met.
Lacks the required domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking.
No demonstrated experience with the Windows platform for C++ development or with SQL Server/Oracle databases.
